title: The Impact of Devolution on Service Delivery in Kenya
citation: Kenyan Journal of Law, Vol. 12, pp. 45-67
excerpt: An analysis of how devolution under the 2010 Constitution has affected service delivery at the county level.

title: Environmental Governance in Kenya: Challenges and Opportunities
citation: East African Law Review, Vol. 8, pp. 123-145
excerpt: A review of Kenya's environmental governance framework under the EMCA and NEMA's effectiveness.

title: Digital Rights and Data Protection in Kenya
citation: African Journal of Information Technology, Vol. 15, pp. 89-112
excerpt: An examination of the Data Protection Act 2019 and its implications for digital rights in Kenya.

title: Gender-Based Violence and the Law in Kenya
citation: Kenyan Journal of Human Rights, Vol. 20, pp. 67-89
excerpt: A legal analysis of gender-based violence legislation and enforcement in Kenya.

title: Tax Justice and the Informal Economy in Kenya
citation: East African Tax Review, Vol. 5, pp. 34-56
excerpt: An exploration of the challenges of taxing Kenya's large informal economy sector.

title: Constitutional Interpretation and the Role of the Judiciary
excerpt: A study of constitutional interpretation methodologies employed by Kenyan courts.

title: Land Rights and Historical Injustice in Kenya
citation: African Journal of Land Law, Vol. 10, pp. 45-67
excerpt: An analysis of the National Land Commission's efforts to address historical land injustices.

title: Criminal Justice Reform in Kenya: Achievements and Challenges
citation: Kenyan Journal of Criminal Law, Vol. 7, pp. 78-101
excerpt: A comprehensive review of criminal justice reform initiatives in Kenya since 2010.
